creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating recent www/firefox from 50.X to 51.X makes port www/firefox-i18n failing:


[...]
===>>> All >> firefox-i18n-50.1.0 (1/1)

===>  Cleaning for firefox-i18n-51.0
===>  firefox-i18n-51.0 cannot install: firefox versions mismatch: firefox-51
is installed and wanted version is firefox-50.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/firefox-i18n
